epic: Wave 1 — Security, CI, Vision Fix, Refactor

stories.title: Fix vision model name — @cf/meta to @cf/llava-hf
stories.description: The Workers AI vision model name changed from @cf/meta/llava-1.5-7b-hf to @cf/llava-hf/llava-1.5-7b-hf. Image upload analysis silently fails because the old model name returns an error that gets caught and swallowed. Fix the model name in both upload.ts and openapi-check-image.ts. Also update the upload.test.ts mock to match the new model name if referenced.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (npx vitest run)

stories.title: Fix timing-safe comparison in webhook signature verification (#316)
stories.description: Webhook signature verification for Telegram and WhatsApp routes uses direct string comparison instead of constant-time comparison. This is vulnerable to timing attacks. Use crypto.subtle.timingSafeEqual or a polyfill for constant-time comparison in all webhook signature checks. Find all webhook signature verification code in src/worker/routes/ and src/worker/lib/ and fix them.
acceptance_criteria: All webhook signature comparisons use timing-safe comparison (crypto.subtle.timingSafeEqual or equivalent)
No direct === or == comparison of signature strings remains

stories.title: CI should validate CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN before deploy (#282)
stories.description: Add a validation step to the GitHub Actions deploy workflow that checks CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN is set as a secret/variable before running wrangler deploy. If missing, the deploy should fail with a clear error message. Check .github/workflows/ for the deploy workflow and add the validation step.
acceptance_criteria: Deploy workflow checks CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN is non-empty before deploy step
Clear error message if CF_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN is missing

stories.title: Extract shared CSP middleware (#319)
stories.description: CSP (Content-Security-Policy) middleware logic is duplicated across multiple route files. Extract it into a shared middleware in src/worker/middleware/ or src/worker/lib/. Find all CSP header setting code, identify the common pattern, extract to a reusable middleware function, and replace all duplicates with the shared version. Add a unit test for the extracted middleware.
acceptance_criteria: Single CSP middleware function in src/worker/middleware/ or src/worker/lib/
All route files use the shared middleware instead of inline CSP logic
Unit test for the CSP middleware
